code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (FinTech_AuthVault)

    COMPLETED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为电商订单履约流程画一个状态图，核心是展示资金托管（Escrow）机制。起点是订单创建后的PENDING状态，然后分支到支付成功或失败。
明白了。支付成功进入PAID状态后，资金是先托管对吧？那这时候要通知卖家发货吗？还有，如果支付失败，是直接到CANCELLED？
对，PAID状态会触发卖家通知，资金处于held状态。支付失败或卖家主动取消都进入CANCELLED。PAID之后卖家发货进入SHIPPED，这里要记录物流信息。
好的，我加上了SHIPPED状态，包含物流数据和资金仍托管的说明。SHIPPED之后是DELIVERED，由carrier报告送达触发。这里需要自动确认机制吗？
DELIVERED要启动自动确认定时器，同时客户也可以主动确认收货进入COMPLETED，或者发起纠纷进入DISPUTED。这两个都是关键分支。
DISPUTED状态需要人工介入对吧？那纠纷解决后有两种结果：支持卖家则到COMPLETED，支持客户则到CANCELLED并退款。这两个终态的资金流向需要区分系统吗？
是的，COMPLETED时资金通过FinTech_PaymentGateway释放给卖家；CANCELLED时通过FinTech_AuthVault退款给客户。另外起点和退款都要经过FinTech_FraudDetection的风控检查。
完成。每个状态我都加上了数据字段和托管状态说明：PENDING时托管未创建，PAID到DELIVERED资金持续held，DISPUTED时frozen，终态才释放或退款。
